business.title: What the ATM might tell us about AI and jobs (NPR+)
business.desc: The threat of automation is a perennial fear for workers. But new tech doesn't always mean being replaced. Alex Mayyasi, the main author of Planet Money's new book, gives Jeff Guo and Nick Fountain a prime example: the introduction of the bank ATM. This is just one of the topics we dig into in today's bonus episode, a condensed audio version of our recent live virtual supporter event. Special guests Louis Lin and Jolyn Chen, co-owners of the Portland, Oregon restaurant Xiao Ye, tell us about their experience with "market menu fit" and how they feel about tipping on takeout. Lastly, the Planet Money team answers YOUR questions, including, "What's the worst and best part of working at Planet Money?" Show your support for Planet Money and the reporting we do by signing up for Planet Money+ in Apple Podcasts or at plus.npr.org/planetmoney. You'll be able to unlock this episode and other great bonus content. Regular episodes remain free to listen!
